title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, essential oils helps with baldness because it promotes hair growth and strengthens hair follicles. The antifungal and antibacterial properties of lavender oil help to reduce scalp irritation and inflammation, creating a healthy environment for hair growth.
